summary: Re-verified the fully static Vercel-deployable frontend after the refactor (removed @emergentbase/visual-edits, added vercel.json + .vercelignore, no-op backend). 10/10 frontend acceptance checks pass via Playwright on the public preview URL. Backend testing was explicitly skipped per request.

verification_results.notes: projects-section and contact-section render; Hero/About/Experience/Skills/Education/Footer visible while scrolling. Dark theme intact.
hero-resume-trigger opens hero-resume-menu; options 0 and 1 have valid .docx hrefs from customer-assets.emergentagent.com; option-2 does not exist.
nav-resume-trigger opens nav-resume-menu; options 0 and 1 have valid .docx hrefs; option-2 does not exist.

verification_results.check: Project cards are router Links and navigate
verification_results.notes: project-card-0 -> /project/cardiovascular-risk-prediction; project-card-1 -> /project/healthcare-operations-dashboard. Click navigates and casestudy-page renders.
4 approach-step-* nodes, 3 result-* nodes, context/problem/challenges/reflection text all visible.
URL becomes /#projects and projects-section renders on home.
Direct navigation renders casestudy-page with correct h1 'Healthcare Operations Analytics Dashboard'.
TCS 'Sep 2025 – Apr 2026' and Cognizant 'Jul 2022 – May 2024' both present.

test_report_links: /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py (from iteration_1; not re-run, per request backend was intentionally reduced to a no-op stub)
critical_code_review_comments: ResumeDownload uses a mousedown outside-click listener; works as expected in browsers but means clicking the trigger on a touchscreen could fire close-on-mousedown if the click target dispatches mousedown twice. Not a current bug, just a watch-out.

CaseStudy <Block> renders <SectionTitle> (which is an h2 with role=heading) inside a flex row with an icon — no a11y issue but consider aria-label on the icon span for screen readers (currently icon is decorative-only, acceptable).
test_credentials: N/A — public static site, no auth.
seed_data_creation: None. Site is fully static; no backend writes performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is fully static. Public URL: https://portfolio-showcase-2828.preview.emergentagent.com. Routes: '/' (Portfolio) and '/project/:slug' (CaseStudy). When asserting framer-motion whileInView elements, scroll the section into view first. The dev-server log line '[visual-edits] not installed — visual editing disabled' is EXPECTED (dependency intentionally removed for Vercel deploy). No backend calls are made by the frontend.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All 11 acceptance checks from the review request pass.
